{{Quote|Jub Vegnu is Jabba the Hutt's go-between. He's so obese that he would have made a good Hutt himself if he's had the right mother.|[[Feltipern Trevagg/Legends|Feltipern Trevagg]]|audio=JubVegnu.flac|<ref name="Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale">{{StoryCite|story=Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
'''Jub Vegnu''' was an extremely obese [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] aide for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. He gave him news from [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the audio dramatization of ''[[Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale]]'', the character was voiced by [[Chris Phillips]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Nightlily: The Lovers' Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{1st}}
